title: wolftpm_rs_shim.c accesses WOLFTPM2_CTX::cmdBuf internal field
description: wolftpm-sys/src/wolftpm_rs_shim.c directly accesses dev->ctx.cmdBuf which is not part of wolfTPM's public API. Tested against wolfTPM v4.0.0/fbbf6fe. The _Static_assert guards catch size changes, but a wolfTPM upgrade that rearranges fields within the same struct size would silently corrupt data. Mitigation: track wolfTPM releases that touch tpm2.h/WOLFTPM2_CTX on every wolfTPM upgrade. Risk is bounded: compile-time guards catch most structural changes.
